name: Mr. Pawn NYC
description_short: Queens-based pawn and resale shop offering instant cash for Apple devices, gold, jewelry, gift cards, and designer goods at a single Richmond Hill location.
description_long:
Mr. Pawn NYC is a locally operated pawn and resale shop situated at 115-23 Jamaica Ave in Richmond Hill, Queens, New York. The business is not a licensed financial institution, credit union, or traditional lender — it operates as a walk-in buy/sell/trade retailer serving the Queens and broader NYC market. It holds no CDFI, HUD, or NFCC certifications, as those designations apply to financial services organizations rather than retail pawn operations. New York City pawnbrokers are regulated by the NYC Department of Consumer and Worker Protection (DCWP), which requires an active pawnbroker license and a $10,000 surety bond; whether Mr. Pawn NYC holds a current DCWP license was not independently confirmed in available public records.

The shop's core offering is straightforward: customers bring in items and receive immediate cash. Mr. Pawn NYC actively purchases Apple products — iPhones, iPads, MacBooks, and Apple Watches — along with gold, diamonds, fine jewelry, and luxury watches. They also buy gift cards from major retailers including Macy's, Best Buy, Kohl's, Saks, Nordstrom, Amazon, eBay, and Bloomingdale's, a service not universally offered by competing pawn shops. Designer sneakers, handbags, and collectibles round out the inventory they accept. All transactions are negotiated in-store on a per-item basis; no published price list, fee schedule, subscription, or loan rate structure was found online.

The shop's standout differentiator is customer satisfaction. Birdeye aggregates a 4.9-star rating across 233 reviews, and Google Maps shows a 5.0-star average from 219 reviewers — unusually strong scores for a pawn operation. Reviewers consistently highlight the clean store environment, knowledgeable and friendly staff, and fair cash offers. The gift card buying service gives the shop a competitive edge, as many pawnbrokers in the area do not accept them. A second Queens location at 19405 Linden Blvd has permanently closed as of October 2025, consolidating operations to the single Jamaica Ave storefront.

Mr. Pawn NYC is a legitimate local option for anyone needing quick cash for electronics, jewelry, or unwanted gift cards, but it comes with the inherent limitations of any pawn shop. Offers are negotiated and will typically reflect wholesale or resale market value rather than retail. No return policy, guarantee, or buyback program was identified. Hours are limited — the shop is closed all day Saturday, closes early on Fridays at 5:30 PM, and is otherwise open standard retail hours. There is no online portal or mobile app for remote transactions, making it strictly a walk-in experience.

pricing.guarantee_details: No return or guarantee policy found. All transactions are negotiated in-store on a per-item basis.

pros: 4.9-star rating across 233 Birdeye reviews and 5.0 stars on Google from 219 reviewers — exceptional for a pawn shop
Buys gift cards from 8+ major retailers (Amazon, Macy's, Best Buy, Nordstrom, etc.) — rare in the NYC pawn market
Accepts a wide range of item types: Apple devices, gold, diamonds, jewelry, watches, designer goods, and collectibles
Walk-in, same-day cash payouts with no appointments or applications required
Reviewers consistently note a clean store environment and knowledgeable, friendly staff
Centrally located on Jamaica Ave in Richmond Hill, Queens, with easy local access
cons: Closed every Saturday, limiting weekend accessibility for working customers
Closes at 5:30 PM on Fridays, making after-work visits difficult on the most common cash-need day
No published pricing or offer rates — customers have no benchmark before walking in
DCWP pawnbroker license status not confirmed in publicly available records
Single location only (second Queens location permanently closed October 2025) — no delivery, no online transactions
best_for: Queens and NYC residents needing immediate cash for used Apple devices
Individuals with unwanted retail gift cards from major stores looking to convert them to cash
Sellers of gold, diamonds, or jewelry who want a local buyer with a strong reputation
Walk-in customers who prefer an in-person transaction over an online mail-in service
diagnosis: Mr. Pawn NYC is best suited for Queens-area residents who want a reputable, locally trusted shop to sell electronics, jewelry, or gift cards for same-day cash — its near-perfect ratings signal consistently fair dealing and professional service. The main caveat is structural: it is a single walk-in location with no Saturday hours, no published offer rates, and no online or remote transaction capability, so it is entirely unsuitable for anyone outside commuting distance or who needs after-hours flexibility.
services: Cash purchases of used Apple iPhones, iPads, MacBooks, and Apple Watches
Gold buying — jewelry, coins, and scrap gold
Gift card purchasing — Amazon, Macy's, Best Buy, Kohl's, Saks, Nordstrom, eBay, Bloomingdale's
In-store retail sales of pre-owned electronics and luxury goods
Instant cash payouts — no waiting period
